title: Phil Tippett: Mad Dreams and Monsters
original_title: Phil Tippett: Mad Dreams and Monsters
overview: An in-depth, sad, and beautiful documentary about the stop motion and VFX artist Phil Tippett, a man who changed the landscape of visual effects in film.
